title: Create: Ultimate Concoction
description:
A modpack built to provide the ultimate Create-based experience!
Contains many Create addons such as Clockwork, Broken Bad, Estrogen, and many more!
body:
A modpack built to provide the ultimate Create-based experience!
Contains many Create addons such as Clockwork, Broken Bad, Estrogen, and many more!
Loaded full of optimization mods so that it can even run on a near decade old laptop (I know because that's what I made and play on the pack with)
Enjoy!
